---
title: "Movie is another extension of life"
comments: false
listing:
    contents: "*/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, reading-time]
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
date-format: iso     
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: true
---
